articles.description: A viral video shows a grey squirrel holding a vape, raising concerns over wildlife exposure to litter and nicotine.

articles.title: West Asia War: Sharif briefs Saudi Crown Prince MBS as Pakistan pushes to mediate US-Iran talks
articles.description: In a bid to mediate rising tensions in the Middle East, Pakistan's Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif briefed Saudi Crown Prince Mohammed bin Salman on diplomatic efforts aimed at fostering dialogue between the US and Iran. As conflict escalates, can Pakistan play a pivotal role in restoring peace?

articles.title: SS Rajamouli's Grand 'Varanasi' Set Unveiled: Release Planned In 2027
articles.description: Mahesh Babu will play dual role, both Rudhra and Lord Ram, while Priyanka Chopra Jonas will be Mandakini and Prithviraj Sukumaran is expected to portray Kumbha.

topStories.description: The Bench said interest payable to the landowners will be according to the land Acquisition Act, which is 9%, and not the NHAI Act, which has a 5% cap

topStories.description: Zolghadr, an ex-IRGC commander, will manage Iran's security amid external US-Israeli pressures and internal unrest.

topStories.description: Tom Hanks embodies a steady presence in Hollywood, emphasizing the temporary nature of both success and failure. His wisdom encourages resilience and a grounded perspective, which is vital in high-pressure environments, reminding us that emotional extremes will pass.

dailyNews.description: Parties normally hold conventions every four years to nominate presidential candidates, but Republicans hope to hold one this year in the face of midterm headwinds.

dailyNews.title: Republicans Step Up Efforts to Reach DHS Funding Deal and End Shutdown
dailyNews.description: A day after President Trump said he did not want a compromise, Senate Republicans sent Democrats a plan that would break off ICE enforcement funding and reopen the rest of the department.

dailyNews.title: Trump Picks ‘Alpha Male’ Influencer to Be Tourism Envoy
dailyNews.description: Nick Adams, known for his crass humor and internet trolling, was previously nominated to be the ambassador to Malaysia. But his nomination was pulled earlier this year.

dailyNews.title: Supreme Court Seems Open to Trump Request to Block Asylum Seekers at Border
dailyNews.description: A policy of turning back many asylum seekers at the border was rescinded in 2021, but the Justice Department wants the flexibility to reinstate it as a tool for border control.

dailyNews.title: Iran war grinds on with Pentagon expected to send more troops to Middle East
dailyNews.description: President Trump said several members of his administration were involved in talks with Iran about the ongoing war.

dailyNews.title: We asked every lawmaker in Congress what they're doing to end the DHS shutdown
dailyNews.description: Lawmakers and President Trump appear to be edging closer to a framework to wrap up the Department of Homeland Security shutdown — but a breakthrough has remained out of reach. CBS News contacted every House and Senate office to ask what they're doing to end the shutdown.

dailyNews.title: 3/24: The Takeout with Major Garrett
dailyNews.description: Trump says Vance and Rubio are involved in talks with Iran; Senate inches toward a potential DHS funding solution.

dailyNews.title: Democrat flips Florida state legislative district that includes Mar-a-Lago
dailyNews.description: Democrat Emily Gregory won a special election for a Florida state House seat on Tuesday, flipping a district that is home to President Trump's estate, Mar-a-Lago.

dailyNews.title: Senate rejects latest push to rein in Trump's powers in Iran as war's off-ramp unclear
dailyNews.description: Democrats have vowed to keep forcing votes on the issue as they seek public testimony from administration officials.

dailyNews.title: Oil trades surged before Trump's Iran post. Some experts are suspicious.
dailyNews.description: Trading in crude oil futures spiked only minutes before President Trump postponed an ultimatum on Iran, causing oil prices to drop and stocks to surge.

dailyNews.title: Surge in oil trades before Trump announced Iran talks draws scrutiny
dailyNews.description: A huge spike in oil futures trading minutes before President Trump announced talks with Iran is drawing suspicion about insider trading. Jill Schlesinger explains.

dailyNews.title: U.S. sent Iran 15-point plan to end war, report says; Trump says 'in negotiations right now'
dailyNews.description: "Operation Epic Fury continues unabated" to achieve President Donald Trump's military objectives, White House press secretary Karoline Leavitt said.
